query: SELECT id, userId, fullName, passportNumber, birthDate, gender, nationality, expiryDate, passportImageUrl, passportImageKey FROM passport_info WHERE passportImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND passportImageUrl != '' ORDER BY id;
